x-enum-comments.ArchitectureTypeMoE: Mixture of Experts (Mixtral, GLaM, Switch Transformer)

contains.description: If field contains any of these strings

value.description: Value to set for the feature

from.description: Source field path in API response (e.g., "max_model_len")

fine_tuned.description: Whether this is a fine-tuned variant

precision.description: Legacy precision format (use Quantization for filtering)

quantized.description: Whether the model has been quantized

max_files.description: Maximum number of files per request

formats.description: Available response formats (if format_response feature enabled)

best_of.description: [Advanced] Supports server-side sampling with best selection

diversity_penalty.description: [Niche] Supports diversity penalty in beam search

early_stopping.description: [Niche] Supports early stopping in beam search

include_reasoning.description: Supports including reasoning traces in response

max_output_tokens.description: [Core] Supports max_output_tokens parameter (some providers distinguish from max_tokens)

temperature.description: Generation control - Core sampling and decoding

tool_calls.description:
Core capabilities
Tool calling system - three distinct aspects:

tools.description: Accepts tool definitions in requests (accepts tools parameter)

top_logprobs.description: [Core] Supports returning top N log probabilities

tool_choices.description:
Tool calling configuration
Specifies which tool choice strategies this model supports.
Requires both Tools=true and ToolChoice=true in ModelFeatures.
Common values: ["auto"], ["auto", "none"], ["auto", "none", "required"]

catalogs.ModelWebSearch.description:
Web search configuration
Only applicable if WebSearch=true in ModelFeatures

max_results.description: Plugin-based web search options (for models using OpenRouter's web plugin)

search_context_sizes.description: Built-in web search options (for models with native web search like GPT-4.1, Perplexity)

aliases.description: Alternative IDs this provider is known by (e.g., in models.dev)

credentials.description: Exact-current provider acquisition and invocation configuration.

id.description: Component ID from the health API

x-enum-comments.ProviderNormalizationUnitCentsPer100Mill: nolint:gosec // Public pricing unit label, not a credential.

trains_on_data.description: Whether provider trains models on user data

catalogs.Quantization.description: Quantization level used by the model

catalogs.SourceExtensions.description: Extensions - controlled source-specific fields that are not canonical schema

catalogs.Tokenizer.description: Tokenizer type used by the model

x-enum-comments.ToolChoiceAuto: Model autonomously decides whether to call tools based on context
x-enum-comments.ToolChoiceNone: Model will never call tools, even if tool definitions are provided
x-enum-comments.ToolChoiceRequired: Model must call at least one tool before responding

info.description:
REST API for the Starmap AI model catalog with real-time updates via WebSocket and SSE.

Features:
- Comprehensive model and provider queries
- Advanced filtering and search
- Real-time updates via WebSocket and Server-Sent Events
- In-memory caching for performance
- Rate limiting and authentication support
info.title: Starmap API

get.description: List all models with optional filtering

parameters.description: Filter by partial model name match
parameters.name: name_contains

parameters.description: Sort field (id, name, release_date, context_window, created_at, updated_at)
parameters.name: sort

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific model
Returns the OpenAPI 3.1 specification for this API in JSON format
Returns the OpenAPI 3.1 specification for this API in YAML format
Get current generation, source freshness, last synchronization, degraded sources, and scheduler state
Retrieve detailed information about a specific provider
List all models for a specific provider
Readiness check including cache and data source status
Get comprehensive server and catalog statistics

parameters.description: Update one source only (local_catalog, providers, models_dev_http, or models_dev_git)
parameters.name: source

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream for catalog change notifications
WebSocket connection for real-time catalog updates
